data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of notifying clients about new provider details. However, the evidence provided does not include any confirmation that such notifications are being sent to clients, which is a critical part of the requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for client notifications, but there is no concrete evidence of this functionality being implemented or executed in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of client notifications being sent with new provider details.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add notification evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that notifications are sent to clients with new provider details.
